contentBlocks.original:
सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थसाधिके
शरण्ये त्र्यम्बके गौरि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalye śive sarvārthasādhike
śaraṇye tryambake gauri nārāyaṇi namo'stu te
contentBlocks.translation: O Nārāyaṇī, who is the most auspicious among all that is auspicious, who grants all desires, who offers refuge, and who is known as Tryambakā (the three-eyed Goddess) and Gaurī, I bow to you.
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्ये (sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalye) – most auspicious (sarva:all | maṅgala:auspicious | māṅgalya:auspiciousness); शिवे (śive) – O auspicious one; सर्वार्थसाधिके (sarvārthasādhike) – grants all desires (sarva:all | artha:desires | sādhike:grants); शरण्ये (śaraṇye) – offers refuge; त्र्यम्बके (tryambake) – three-eyed Goddess (tri:three | ambaka:eye); गौरि (gauri) – Gaurī; नारायणि (nārāyaṇi) – O Nārāyaṇī; नमः (namaḥ) – I bow; अस्तु (astu) – let it be; ते (te) – to you;
